name: ALL-Q-TELL Corp.
summary: ALL-Q-TELL Corp., through its subsidiaries, develops integrated solutions in the areas of security, intelligence, and law enforcement for addressing threats to the United States and other its allies nations' national security. It also provides strategic, tactical intelligence, and security services to multinational organizations, and the United States and international government customers. The company was formerly known as Sleep Holdings Inc. and changed its name to ALL-Q-TELL Corp. in November 2010. ALL-Q-TELL Corp. is based in Dallas, Texas.
